mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.blog_id = #{blogId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.blog_id = #{blogId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname, b.title as blog_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN blog b ON c.blog_id = b.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE blog_id = #{blogId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (blog_id, user_id, parent_id, content, author_name, author_email, ip_address, status) VALUES (#{blogId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{ipAddress}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
